name: Champion Malasadas
tagline: Kailua's neighborhood malasada spot — lighter and less greasy than the famous ones, with perfect sugar coating.
talkStory: While Leonard's gets all the fame, Windward side locals swear by Champion Malasadas in Kailua. The malasadas here are lighter and less greasy, with a perfect sugar coating. The haupia-filled and custard-filled versions are excellent. Located in a small shopping center, it's a true neighborhood spot where you'll see locals grabbing a box on the way home. Freshest in the morning.
